zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Godbold於1473年出生在英國素福爾可丹寧頓時，他的父親Thomas Godbold23歲，母親Margery Storye18歲。他於大約1496年與Margery Roger在英國素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1536年10月7日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Godbold于1473年出生在英国素福爾可丹寧頓时，他的父亲Thomas Godbold23岁，母亲Margery Storye18岁。他于大约1496年与Margery Roger在英国素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1536年10月7日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Godbold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Suffolk): from the Middle English and Old French personal name Godebald, Godbaud, a medieval French form of the ancient Germanic name Godebald, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ or god ‘god’ + bald ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Godbold was born in 1473, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Godbold, was 23 and his mother, Margery Storye, was 18. He married Margery Roger about 1496, in Dennington, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 7 October 1536, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Godbold est né en 1473, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Godbold, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margery Storye, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margery Roger environ 1496, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1536, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Godbold 1473 in Dennington, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Godbold 23 und seine Mutter Margery Storye 18. Er hat um 1496 in Dennington, Suffolk, England Margery Roger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1536 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Godbold è nato il nel 1473 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Godbold, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margery Storye, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margery Roger circa 1496, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1536, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Godboldが1473年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Godboldは23歳，母Margery Storyeは18歳であった。約1496年にイギリススフォルクデニントンでMargery Rogerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1536年10月7日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Godbold(이)가 1473년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Godbold(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Storye(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1496년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Margery Roger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1536년 10월 7일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

mn.of Dennington, Suffolk, England: Dennington, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Godbold nasceu em 1473, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Godbold, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margery Storye, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Roger aproximadamente 1496, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1536, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Godbold родился в 1473 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Godbold было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Storye, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Roger около 1496 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1536 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Godbold nació en 1473, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Godbold, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margery Storye, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margery Roger aproximadamente 1496, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1536, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
